---
title: "Gallery"
toc: false
---

Every figure below renders at build time from an editable,
version-controlled source — no exported images anywhere in the repo.
Click a card for the full page, with view-source links under every
figure and click-to-zoom throughout.

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
### [Excalidraw](excalidraw.qmd)
[![](figures/arch.excalidraw)](excalidraw.qmd)

Hand-drawn sketches from scene files
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
### [Vega-Lite & Vega](vega.qmd)
[![](figures/trend.vl.json)](vega.qmd)

Charts and force-directed graphs from JSON grammars
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
### [Graphviz & DBML](graphviz.qmd)
[![](figures/deps.dot)](graphviz.qmd)

Graph layouts and database schemas
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
### [nomnoml](nomnoml.qmd)
[![](figures/states.noml)](nomnoml.qmd)

Node-edge and UML diagrams from terse text
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
### [WaveDrom](wavedrom.qmd)
[![](figures/handshake.wavedrom.json)](wavedrom.qmd)

Timing and register diagrams
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
### [bytefield](bytefield.qmd)
[![](figures/tcp-header.bytefield)](bytefield.qmd)

Byte and packet layouts
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
### [PlantUML](plantuml.qmd)
[![](figures/sequence.puml)](plantuml.qmd)

UML via a kroki endpoint
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
### [More kroki formats](kroki.qmd)
[![](figures/arch.d2)](kroki.qmd)

D2, C4, Structurizr, ditaa, TikZ …
:::

:::

All formats were chosen for **agent fluency** — see
[Agents & figures](../agents.qmd). Every figure here was written by an
agent.
